name: Mississippi Mud Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. To prepare the cake batter, combine the butter and sugar in a mixing bowl. Beat well until creamy.
3. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Sift together the flour and cocoa. Fold this into the mixture.
5. Combine the pecans and vanilla extract, then add to the batter.
6. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan and bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from oven and let stand until thoroughly cooled.
8. Cut into slices and serve.
